summary: A single-story rectangular bunker or fortified structure with a flat roof. The building features a concrete foundation and perimeter wall, brick upper walls, and multiple small window openings. The structure is partially sunken into the ground with a white concrete border frame.

shape.overall_form: rectangular box, partially recessed into ground

rebuild_hints: Create a rectangular pit approximately 12×16 blocks, depth 3-4 blocks
Build concrete border frame (white concrete) around the pit perimeter
Construct lower wall section using stonebrick blocks
Add middle wall section with mixed stonebrick and stone variants
Top with brick layer (red brick pattern visible)
Install small rectangular windows (2-3 blocks wide, 1-2 blocks tall) evenly spaced on all four sides
Cap with flat roof using concrete or stone slabs
Ensure symmetrical window placement on opposing walls
Add concrete coping/trim at roof edge
uncertainties: Exact window dimensions and spacing pattern uncertain from angles shown
Interior layout and floor details not visible
Precise block count for each material layer requires closer inspection
Whether structure has interior floor or is open to ground level
Exact shade variations in brick may indicate different brick types or aging
